title: LoRa Watch
profTagline: See and decode LoRa in the 868 MHz band with your HackRF
installDesc: Add to your home screen for full-screen use.
installIosHint: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: Open the browser menu and choose Install.
connectBody: Plug the HackRF into this phone with a USB-C OTG cable, then grant access. It watches the LoRa band on-device — the chirps in a waterfall, and decodes packets to raw bytes.
noUsb: This browser has no WebUSB. Open in Chrome on Android or desktop.
